texto: This was one of those moments when I realized that my emotional baggage, once a few neatly packed pieces, was now like the Joads' truck, stacked high with old clothes, half a rocking chair, a mule, all barely secured with twine.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Amy Cohen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “This was one of those moments when I realized that my emotional baggage, once a few neatly packed…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, relationships, those pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
